references.role: structural Licorn kitchen context for all Seedance segments
references.prompt: Use only to preserve the Licorn kitchen layout and material identity; do not force wide framing unless the prompt asks for it.

references.role: active island view for plating, final hero and outro
references.prompt: Use to preserve the light terrazzo island, foreground dish placement and final hero context.

references.role: overhead island view for hook shower and chopping
references.prompt: Use for overhead macro food actions on the island; preserve the same countertop material.

references.role: active close-up view for boiling, roasting, brown butter and tossing
references.prompt: Use for close-up pan and pot actions on the black flush induction surface; no flames.

references.role: wide induction setup view for pasta pot
references.prompt: Use for pot setup context while keeping the same black induction geometry.

references.role: large pot shape for boiling orecchiette and conditioning pasta references
references.prompt: Use as the large boiling vessel shape; do not imply an open flame.

references.role: wide pan stand-in for roasting pistachios, crisping topping, browning butter and tossing pasta
references.prompt: Use only for the broad pan geometry on induction; keep the food Italian-lemon-butter, not stir-fry.

references.role: spoon shape for burrata split, sauce trail and topping shower
references.prompt: Use for spoon drag, burrata opening, sauce trail and spoonfuls of crunchy topping.

references.role: tongs shape for pasta lift and glossy toss
references.prompt: Use for lifting and folding orecchiette; avoid fork lift drift.

references.role: knife shape for chopping roasted pistachios
references.prompt: Use as a stable chef knife with visible hand control; no floating blade.

references.role: chopping surface for roasted pistachios
references.prompt: Use as the board under the pistachio rough chop.

references.role: lemon zest tool shape for final garnish
references.prompt: Use for visible lemon zest threads; avoid turning zest into sauce or cheese.

references.role: Licorn character identity lock for visible hands and final satisfaction
references.prompt: Use for character identity only; do not redesign the mascot.

references.role: top-down Licorn hands for chopping, pouring and plating
references.prompt: Use only to preserve visible hand position in overhead action shots.

references.role: front-facing satisfied Licorn pose for final hero
references.prompt: Use for character satisfaction behind the island without touching the dish.

references.role: happy satisfied expression for final hero
references.prompt: Use only to keep the final Licorn expression satisfied and warm.

references.role: canonical Licorn celebration motion reference for the standardized outro
references.prompt: Use only in segment-outro as the fixed motion reference; Recipe2Video injects the canonical prompt.

references.role: plain cooked orecchiette shape and scale anchor
references.prompt: Generate one vertical-reference still of al dente orecchiette in the Licorn kitchen: small 2-3 cm ear-shaped pasta cups, lightly steamy and glossy from cooking water, no sauce yet, no spaghetti, no penne, no giant shells. Keep the shape readable in a shallow cluster near a large pot on the induction area.

references.role: coarse roasted pistachio, caper and panko topping texture
references.prompt: Generate one vertical-reference still of a generous coarse crunchy topping in the Licorn kitchen: golden panko crumbs, wrinkled fried capers, chopped roasted pistachio chunks with green interiors and toasted brown edges, thyme flecks, red chili specks and parmesan crumbs. It should look dry, crisp and spoonable, not wet paste and not powder.

references.role: brown butter, garlic and lemon sauce target state
references.prompt: Generate one vertical-reference still of brown lemon butter in a pan on the Licorn induction surface: warm amber glossy butter with tiny browned milk solids, pale garlic bits, bright yellow lemon zest threads and a thin fluid shine. It must not look black, burnt, creamy cheese sauce or watery soup.

references.role: orecchiette coated in glossy lemon butter emulsion
references.prompt: Generate one vertical-reference still of lemon butter orecchiette in the Licorn kitchen: 2-3 cm ear-shaped pasta cups coated in a silky amber-yellow lemon butter emulsion, tiny lemon zest threads and steam, sauce clinging inside the cups. No burrata yet, no spaghetti, no penne, no watery pool.

references.role: torn burrata skin and thick stracciatella cream texture
references.prompt: Generate one vertical-reference still of one palm-sized burrata ball opened over glossy lemon butter orecchiette in the Licorn kitchen: taut mozzarella skin torn once, thick white stracciatella cream spilling slowly into the pasta cups. It must not look like melted mozzarella, ricotta crumbs, watery milk or many tiny cheese balls.

references.role: final finished dish identity for hero shots and standardized outro
references.prompt: Generate one vertical-reference still of the final Lemon Butter Orecchiette with Burrata in the Licorn kitchen on the light terrazzo island: one shallow hero bowl of glossy 2-3 cm orecchiette, one torn burrata with thick cream visible, generous roasted pistachio-caper-panko crunch, basil leaves, parmesan, black pepper and yellow lemon zest. The dish is intact and motionless, no utensil inside it, no spoon dive, no slice, no drip action. Keep it sexy, creamy, crunchy and high-contrast without changing the Licorn kitchen context.
